summary: Iteration 6 testing complete: Responsiveness and Auth Security features verified. Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy, EMERGENT_AUTH_URL is in .env (but still has hardcoded fallback in code), CORS headers present, all protected endpoints return 401 without auth. Frontend: Login page responsive across mobile/tablet/desktop, Dashboard shows hamburger menu on mobile with drawer sidebar, sidebar hidden on mobile and visible on desktop, summary cards use 2-col grid on mobile and 4-col on desktop, transaction table shows card layout on mobile and grid on desktop, no horizontal overflow on any viewport.

minor.issue: EMERGENT_AUTH_URL has hardcoded fallback URL in os.environ.get() - should remove fallback for security

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality
Console hydration warnings about span inside select - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'healthy', database: 'connected'}
Backend: CORS headers present on OPTIONS and GET requests
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without session
Backend: All protected endpoints (/api/categories, /api/transactions, etc.) return 401 without auth
Backend: EMERGENT_AUTH_URL is defined in /app/backend/.env
Backend: No hardcoded API keys or passwords in server.py
Frontend: Login page renders correctly on mobile (390x844) - centered form, no hero image
Frontend: Login page renders correctly on tablet (768x1024) - centered form
Frontend: Login page renders correctly on desktop (1920x1080) - split layout with hero image
Frontend: No horizontal overflow on login page at any viewport
Frontend: Dashboard shows hamburger menu (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn') on mobile
Frontend: Dashboard sidebar hidden on mobile (lg:hidden)
Frontend: Dashboard sidebar visible on desktop (lg:flex)
Frontend: Mobile sidebar drawer opens when hamburger clicked
Frontend: Mobile sidebar drawer has overlay and X button to close
Frontend: Summary cards use grid-cols-2 on mobile, grid-cols-4 on desktop (lg breakpoint)
Frontend: Due cards (Vencidos/Vencendo/Futuro) stack vertically on mobile, horizontal on desktop
Frontend: Transaction table shows desktop grid layout (hidden md:grid) on desktop
Frontend: Transaction table shows mobile card layout (md:hidden) on mobile
Frontend: No horizontal overflow on dashboard at mobile viewport
Frontend: No horizontal overflow on despesas page at mobile viewport
Frontend: Charts are responsive with proper height
action_items: OPTIONAL: Remove hardcoded fallback URL from EMERGENT_AUTH_URL in server.py and auth.py for stricter security
critical_code_review_comments: Responsiveness implementation is correct - uses Tailwind breakpoints (lg:, md:) properly
Sidebar drawer pattern on mobile works correctly with overlay
Transaction table dual layout (desktop grid + mobile cards) implemented correctly
Summary cards grid responsive classes (grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4) working
Tailwind safelist includes dynamic sidebar offset classes
EMERGENT_AUTH_URL moved to .env but fallback URL still in code - minor security concern
Session uses httpOnly cookies with secure and samesite=none flags
CORS middleware added before routes with configurable origins
test_credentials: Created temporary test user (test_user_responsive_*) for dashboard testing - cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Created test user with categories, transactions, goals, accounts for responsiveness testing - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified responsiveness and auth security: (1) Login page responsive across all viewports; (2) Dashboard uses drawer sidebar on mobile with hamburger menu (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn'); (3) Summary cards use grid-cols-2 on mobile, grid-cols-4 on desktop; (4) Transaction table shows cards on mobile, grid on desktop; (5) EMERGENT_AUTH_URL in .env; (6) CORS configured; (7) httpOnly cookies for sessions. Key breakpoints: lg (1024px) for sidebar visibility, md (768px) for transaction table layout.

login_page.mobile_390: VERIFIED - centered form, no hero image, no overflow
login_page.desktop_1920: VERIFIED - split layout with hero image

dashboard.mobile_sidebar: VERIFIED - hidden, hamburger menu visible, drawer opens on click

auth_security_verified.httponly_cookies: VERIFIED - session_token cookie has httpOnly=True, secure=True, samesite=none
